hero.title: Real teams. Measurable outcomes.
hero.subtitle: Explore how engineering organizations use Leanmote to improve delivery speed, tighten flow efficiency, and prove ROI with operational evidence.

studies.headline: Vita Wallet cut delivery lead time by 24% and unlocked $125k yearly savings.
studies.description: The team was shipping with high work-in-progress and low flow focus. With Leanmote, they identified overloaded review lanes, reduced active tasks, and made handoffs more predictable.
studies.quote: Leanmote made the bottleneck visible in less than one sprint. We reduced WIP pressure and recovered delivery rhythm without increasing headcount.
studies.author: Engineering Lead

studies.headline: Gauss Control accelerated change lead time by 37% and saved $270k per year.
studies.description: Slow review loops and uneven workload were delaying releases. Leanmote highlighted aging pull requests and queue imbalance so the team could optimize ownership and review response times.
studies.quote: We shifted from intuition to evidence. The recommendations were practical, and review turnaround dropped almost by half in a single quarter.
studies.author: CTO

studies.headline: Holon Software reduced cycle time by 55% while increasing deployment consistency.
studies.description: As product demand grew, cycle time variance started hurting roadmap confidence. Leanmote surfaced recurring blockers in review and pickup stages, enabling tighter sprint planning and faster PR pickup.
studies.quote: The biggest win was predictability. We now detect drift early, rebalance tasks faster, and keep high-priority work flowing with fewer delays.
studies.author: Director of Engineering
